multiplechoiceresponse.label: Assume \(Y_i \in\{+1,-1\}\) and labels are transformed using \(Y_i^{\prime}=Y_i\left(1-2 Z_i\right)\). Which statement is correct?

choicegroup.choice: If \(Z_i=0\), the label is removed from the dataset
If \(Z_i=1\), the observation is ignored during training

div.p: When \(Z_i=0\), the multiplier is \(1-0=1\), so \(Y_i^{\prime}=Y_i\). This means no label flip occurs for that observation. Lecture 2 emphasizes that only a subset of labels are flipped, while the rest remain unchanged. There is no mechanism here for setting labels to zero or ignoring observations.
